tagline: Custom Pools & Outdoor Living in South Florida

hero.headline:
Your Dream Backyard Built to
Last Decades
hero.subheadline: For 28 years, Anything Wet Pools & Spas has turned ordinary South Florida backyards into resort-style escapes. From custom pools and spas to outdoor kitchens and fire features — we handle every detail so you just enjoy the result.
checkmarks: Full-service build from start to finish

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Pool & Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From the first sketch to the final tile, Anything Wet handles every phase of your backyard transformation. No subcontractor runaround — just one team, one vision, one stunning result.

cards.title: Pool Design & Construction
cards.description: Custom in-ground pools tailored to your lifestyle, space, and vision. From freeform lagoons to sleek modern designs — built to last in the South Florida climate.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Breathe new life into your existing pool with updated finishes, tile, coping, and equipment upgrades that make it look and perform like new.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living
cards.description: Fully equipped outdoor cooking and entertaining spaces designed to complement your pool area and elevate your backyard lifestyle.

cards.title: Spas & Water Features
cards.description: Relaxing spa installations and custom water features — waterfalls, grottos, and modern accent elements that add drama and tranquility.

cards.title: Fire Features & Lighting
cards.description: Custom fire pits, fire bowls, and ambient LED lighting that extend your outdoor enjoyment well into the evening hours.

cards.title: Decks, Patios & Pergolas
cards.description: Elegant hardscape surfaces and shade structures including pavers, natural stone, and custom pergolas for beautiful outdoor living.

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us what you want for your backyard. We visit your property, listen to your ideas, and provide a free design consultation with honest pricing — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build It
steps.description: Our experienced in-house team handles everything from permits and design to construction and finishing. Owner Pat oversees every project personally for quality you can count on.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Paradise
steps.description: Your resort-style backyard is ready for family gatherings, weekend barbecues, and evening relaxation. We stand behind every project and are always a phone call away.

about.label: Why South Florida Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated Since 1997 — Your Backyard Is Personal to Us
about.description: Founded in 1997 by Pat, Anything Wet Pools & Spas has spent nearly three decades transforming backyards across Palm Beach, Broward, and surrounding South Florida communities. We are not a franchise or a faceless corporation — we are a hands-on team that treats every project like it is our own home. With BBB accreditation for 18+ years and hundreds of completed projects, our reputation is built on delivering exactly what we promise.

features.title: Licensed & Fully Insured
features.description: State-licensed pool contractor with full liability coverage. Every project meets or exceeds Florida building codes and safety standards.

features.title: Owner On Every Job Site
features.description: Pat personally manages each project from design through completion. You always have a direct line to the person in charge.

features.title: Built to Last in South Florida
features.description: We use materials and techniques proven to withstand South Florida's heat, humidity, and salt air — so your investment looks stunning for decades.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. Contact us for a free design consultation and detailed quote tailored to your backyard and budget.

guarantee.headline: Our "Resort-Quality" Promise
guarantee.description: We do not cut corners and we do not disappear after the build. If anything about your project does not meet the standard we promised, we come back and make it right — period. With 28 years of standing behind our work, your satisfaction is not just a goal, it is our reputation.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool project take?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool builds take 8-14 weeks depending on scope and complexity. Remodeling projects are typically faster at 3-6 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline during your free consultation so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits and inspections?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle every permit, inspection, and code requirement from start to finish. As a licensed Florida pool contractor, we know the local building codes inside and out so you never have to worry about compliance.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Palm Beach County, Broward County, and surrounding South Florida communities including Boca Raton, Delray Beach, Loxahatchee Groves, and more. If you are in South Florida, give us a call — we likely cover your area.

faqs.question: Can you remodel my existing pool?
faqs.answer: Yes! Pool remodeling is one of our specialties. Whether you want new tile, updated finishes, modern coping, LED lighting, or a complete backyard overhaul — we can transform your existing pool into something you will love again.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing options?
faqs.answer: We work with homeowners to find solutions that fit their budget. Contact us to discuss your project and we will walk you through available options during your free consultation.

testimonials.name: Donny
testimonials.text: Pat and his team were true to their word. They were true professionals and built an exceptional pool in record time at a competitive cost!!

testimonials.name: Frances A.
testimonials.text: Very professional and they exceeded our expectations. They finished everything in less time than calculated. Could not be happier with the result.

testimonials.name: Jill A. Kay
testimonials.text: My pool looks AMAZING and I am so pleased with the outcome. I am so glad I went with Anything Wet. They delivered exactly what they promised.
